titleStmt.title: SII 7.433: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 433. (A.R. No. 220 of 1901). ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE SAME MANDAPA.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiruvāykkeḻvi muṉpāka tribhu vaṉaccakra vattikaḷ virar Abhiṣeka mum vijai yar A
bhiṣe kamum paṇṇia ruḷiya śrītribhu vaṉaviratevaṟkku yāṇṭu 3 10 2 nā(ḷ)
ḷ 3 10 56- ṉāl nantipanmaṉ ceyyatiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi ja
yaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu Eyiṟkoṭṭattu mākaṟal (tiruvaka)ti
ruvakattiśvara muṭai yāṟkku Ikkoṭṭattu Irumaramāṉa kulottuṅka
coḻanallūr tarappaṭi viḷainilam 3 10- veliyūm Eriyum Eriko Uḷppaṭṭa nilamla
mum kollai nilam pattu veliyum kāliyūrkkoṭṭattu veṇkaṟceri tarappaṭi
nilam 3 10nta Ūrnattamuṅ kollai nilam 10 1- veliyum paḻantevatāṉai
ṟaiyili yeṉṟum Iṉ nilam paḻampaṭiye Ittevaṟkut tevatāṉaiṟaiyili
yāy niṟkavum Ikkoyilun tevatāṉamuṅ kāliṅkarāyaṉukkup paṟṟāy niṟkavum
kaṭavatāy peṟaveṇumeṉṟu Ivaṉ nama
kkuc connamaiyil Ippaṭi ceyyakka
ṭavatākac collik kaṇakkilum Iṭṭukko
ḷḷakkaṭavarkaḷā(ā)ka varikkūṟu ceyvā
rkkuñ coṉṉom Iṉṉilam paḻampa
ṭiye Ittevaṟkut tevatāṉa Iṟaiyili
yāka niṟkavum Ikkoyilun tevatā
ṉaṅkaḷum Uḷpaṭa Ivaṉukkup paṟṟākak kuṭukka
p paṇṇuvatu Eḻutiṉāṉ tirumantiraolai Irā
canārāyaṇamuveṉtaveḷāṉ Ippaṭi tiruvāymo
ḻin=ta (ri)ruḷiṉāṉ Ivai villavarāyan EḻuttuThe letter ḻu is written below the line.ivai vāṇātarājan Eḻuttu Ivai toṇṭai mā ṉeḻuttuThe letter ḻu is written below the line.Ivai viḻiñattarayan EḻuttuThe letter ḻu is written below the line.Ivai ciṅ kaḷarāyan EḻuttuThe letter ḻu is written below the line.Ivai cittarāyan EḻuttuThe letter ḻu is written below the line.kāṭavarāyan Eḻuttu Aṅkarāyan EḻuttuThe letter ḻu is written below the line.yilāṭattara
yan Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 7.433 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
